{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231951378D029CC148E3CDDCF3E2"}"},"total":391},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7316216291814916890","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"卧槽这本我喜欢，好看爱看快多更!!只求不要太监或烂尾!![爱心][爱心][爱心][爱心][爱心][KISS][KISS]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1703442027,"group_id":"7310571215481998386","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"嗯哼……","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzQTiSVdJaLbNp9kvqSTqho=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/682dccfe47374006b6170bced24bfcc8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791936&x-signature=i7LlMPcqrN71iYnISjKUYrBmazo%3D","user_id":"405050532047127","user_name":"海燕手帐"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"405050532047127","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1717561489,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7310571215481998386","book_info":{"abstract":"［规则怪谈＋系统兜底＋诡异荒诞＋轻搞笑＋无女主］
张辰死后重生到蓝星，蓝星是一颗被怪谈世界选中的世界，和张辰前世所在的地球极为相似。
每个国家都会被抽出一个人参加怪谈世界的副本挑战，而张辰将作为天选者代替龙国参加挑战。
副本：五口之家……
别人都怕妈妈怕的不行，你怎么还和妈妈认上亲了？！
高危险度的大黄狗，要你去遛狗，你怎么骑它背上了？！
小偷要来偷东西，准备提前偷袭小偷的你是认真的吗？！
你即将离开副本，爸爸把他的皮夹克都给你了还依依不舍，舍不得你离开，这是闹哪样啊？！
副本黑暗森林、副本众禾高中、副本宅系人生、副本惊魂万圣节……
主角张辰在怪谈世界披荆斩棘，带着龙国走向强大，其他国家为了在怪谈世界的惩罚下活命，龙国最后竟然“被迫”收了无数附属国……
张辰一直以为这样惊心动魄的日子会持续下去，反正有系统兜底，他一直超勇的好嘛！
但是每个人都会死的，张辰是很怕死，他还没活够，重活一次的他比任何人都珍惜生命。
自己死亡和蓝星毁灭张辰会选哪个呢？
去特么的命运，我命由己不由天！
而当张辰死亡，蜕变才刚刚开始，我们的故事也才刚拉开序幕……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/de1fa3032a47d57d34e35cb504dfa313","author":"最后一条肚肚鱼","author_id":"","book_id":"7310571215481998386","book_name":"规则怪谈：开局获得污染抗性","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9101人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":851,"name":"规则怪谈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=851&name=规则怪谈&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":864,"name":"副本","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=864&name=副本&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7310571219064422950","read_count":"9101","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2619461"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.3","serial_count":"1171"
